HGSS.496.0000:
I’m the Game Director!\f
Filling up your Pokédex is tough,
but don’t give up!\f
You can do it! Seriously!
HGSS.496.0001:
Wow, you did it!
You have filled up the\r
Johto Pokédex!\f
Impressive! I’m amazed!
I will reward you for that!\r
Seriously!\f
HGSS.496.0002:
Wow! Excellent!
You completed your Pokédex!\r
Congratulations!\f
You must be the genius of the century!
Seriously!\f
Game Freak will give you an award
and prove that it’s the truth!\f
HGSS.496.0003:
I bet it was a long way to complete
the Pokédex.\f
Remember, the most precious thing of
all was the time you’ve worked hard\r
going everywhere to complete\r
the Pokédex.\f
I just said something deep! Seriously!
HGSS.496.0004:
I am the Graphic Designer!
I am a skilled dot artist!
HGSS.496.0005:
I am the Programmer!\f
I control the world of games
with my fingertip!
HGSS.496.0006:
I am the Planner!
I come up with great ideas!\f
This place you’re standing
here is no exception! Hahaha!
HGSS.496.0007:
I am the Sound Designer!
I compose music.\f
I’ll give you something cool if you
manage to collect all eight\r
Kanto Badges and show them to me.
HGSS.496.0008:
I am the Sound Designer!
I compose music.\f
Wow, you have collected
all the Kanto Badges already!\r
That’s great!\f
I’ll give you something cool
for that.\f
HGSS.496.0010:
GB is a rectangular thing with a
black-and-white screen that you used\r
to play the original Pokémon...\r
Oh, wait! That was a Game Boy!\f
Turn it on and GB Sounds will let you
hear some nostalgic sounds.\f
It’s a gadget full of wonder!
Try it at various places!\f
There are some places you won’t
hear classic music...\f
But that’s life!
HGSS.496.0011:
I find GB Sounds to be incredible!
Even places that were built recently\r
have nice, classic music.\f
Behold the full extent of my passion!\f
...Did I say “behold”? What am
I saying?\f
Anyway, try it at various places!\f
There are some places you won’t
hear classic music...\f
But that’s life!
HGSS.496.0014:
Lyra: Guess what?\f
That Sound Designer over there
showed me something cool.\f
It’s a hi-tech, retro machine to
listen to music from the Game Boy!\f
He said he’ll give it to anyone
who has collected all of the\r
Kanto Badges.\f
Why don’t you go for it, [0103,0000,0000]?
See ya!\f
HGSS.496.0015:
Ethan: Guess what?\f
That Sound Designer over there
showed me something cool.\f
It’s a hi-tech, retro machine to
listen to music from the Game Boy!\f
He said he’ll give it to anyone
who has collected all of the\r
Kanto Badges.\f
Why don’t you go for it, [0103,0000,0000]?
See ya!\f
HGSS.496.0017:
This elevator goes straight between
the second floor and the roof.
HGSS.496.0018:
It’s the game program.\f
Messing with it could ruin it.
You cannot touch it!
HGSS.496.0019:
Pokémon stickers are everywhere
on the desk!
HGSS.496.0020:
There are many photo collections
and books about myths!
HGSS.496.0021:
What do you think?\f
I am the President here.\f
We are remaking an old game,
but this is quite a challenge.\f
Old fans would not want us to mess
with their good memories...\r
but there is no point in just\r
redoing the same thing, right?\f
We are working toward something
that brings back memories,\r
yet is also completely new!\f
I’ve been in this business for 20 years
now, but creating a game is always a\r
rewarding challenge!
